message:
chore: UBS suppression annotations, macros_race cleanup, oracle fix

Mechanical improvements with no behavioral changes (except the
oracle fabric clone fix):

- cx/registry.rs, http/body.rs, transport/stream.rs,
  transport/tests.rs, transport/router.rs: add // ubs:ignore
  annotations to panic! arms in test code to suppress Ultimate Bug
  Scanner false-positive warnings on intentional test panics

- examples/macros_race.rs: introduce BoxFuture<T> and NamedFuture<T>
  type aliases to reduce repetition; add Send + 'static bounds to
  all four RaceCx async methods for consistency with the macro DSL

- lab/oracle/fabric.rs: add .clone() to Arc<Mutex<Vec>> before
  moving into EventRecorder, fixing a use-after-move that would
  prevent compilation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
